channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: FATF Flags Peer-to-Peer Stablecoin Transfers as Top Money Laundering Risk
item.description: The Financial Action Task Force wants issuers to embed freeze and deny-list controls directly into smart contracts.

item.title: Bitcoin holds above $72,000 as crypto market pauses after breakout
item.description: Bitcoin and ether edged higher as traders assessed macro risks, derivatives positioning and whether bitcoin can sustain a push toward $80,000.

item.title: Trump-backed American Bitcoin board members scoop up stock following earnings
item.description: Board members Justin Mateen and Richard Busch bought roughly 1.6 million shares after the trading window reopened following the bitcoin miner’s latest earnings report.

item.title: UAE central bank says financial system stable amid missile and drone attacks
item.description: More than 1,800 crypto businesses operate in the UAE, with over 600 Web3 companies based in Dubai’s DMCC free zone.

item.title: Andreessen Horowitz crypto arm said to seek $2 billion for fifth fund: Fortune
item.description: The venture firm led by Chris Dixon is reportedly aiming to close its fifth crypto fund in the first half of 2026, signaling continued bets on blockchain startups.

item.title: Chamath Palihapitiya questions bitcoin’s role as central bank reserve asset
item.description: Billionaire Venture capitalist points to privacy and fungibility concerns, while debate grows over corporate bitcoin strategies such as Strategy’s massive holdings.

item.title: Coinbase execs face new lawsuit seeking damages, insider profit clawbacks
item.description: The lawsuit seeks damages for Coinbase, governance reforms and the return of compensation and profits allegedly earned by insiders amid the company’s compliance failures.

item.title: Reform UK tops donations with millions from Thailand-based crypto investor: Report
item.description: Nigel Farage’s Reform UK reportedly secured a second boost of 3 million British pounds ($4 million) from Thailand-based crypto investor Christopher Harborne

item.title: ZeroHash applies for national trust bank charter to expand regulated stablecoin services
item.description: A charter would allow ZeroHash to operate under a single federal framework, rather than state-by-state rules and offer services aligned with recent legislation.

item.title: IREN to expand processing capacity by 50%, prepares at-the-market offering
item.description: The company ordered more than 50,000 Nvidia GPUs and filed for a potential $6 billion at-the-market share sale, sending the stock lower in pre-market trading.

item.title: Stablecoin inflows rebound to $1.7B as Washington battles over yield rules
item.description: Messari said weekly stablecoin inflows rose 414% to $1.7 billion as debate over yield-bearing stablecoins continued to stall US crypto market structure talks.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs pull in $462M as BTC briefly tops $73K
item.description: BlackRock’s IBIT led inflows with $307 million as almost all US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded inflows on Wednesday, extending a three-day inflow streak totaling $1.1 billion.

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Google warns crypto scams are using an iPhone exploit kit called “Coruna,” targeting older iOS versions. The kit scans for crypto wallets, seed phrases and financial data via malicious websites. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9NUFItQ2xoS2toMjVYX2hpNmVYNTlkTXZjeUdlSGlrYXUySTdtSUlSYWNTcFAzazBNZG1vUXk2TXB2MTFXbjBZUk1LZXZaS3lfQ2l2VlNjYmhaUVJGcWh2LWpFMWI?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Google warns crypto s…

item.title: Bitcoin traders, alert: The rally is nearing a two-year 'make or break' price zone
item.description: The cryptocurrency traders near key price zone that has marked major turning points over the past two years.

item.title: Anthropic reopens Pentagon talks as tech groups push Trump to drop risk tag: FT
item.description: Anthropic previously secured a $200 million Pentagon contract, and its AI has been used in classified operations, including support for US airstrikes on Iran, the Financial Times reports.

item.title: Ether, solana, xrp surge 8% as crypto markets rally on easing war fears
item.description: Ether surged 7.5%, dogecoin jumped 7.5%, and solana added 5.3% as global equities rebounded and $700 million flowed into U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs since the start of March.

item.title: Crypto stocks rally as Trump, regulators signal pro-crypto policy shift
item.description: Bitcoin has jumped as well, increasing 7.6% in the last 24 hours, while Ether is up more than 8.3% to trade at $2,132.

item.title: Google uncovers iOS exploit kit used in crypto phishing attacks
item.description: Researchers say fake crypto websites deployed an iOS exploit kit capable of stealing wallet seed phrases and other financial data.

item.title: Altcoin chatter sinks to 2-year low as Bitcoin holds attention
item.description: While altcoin interest on social media is at its lowest in 24 months, it could pick up again once Bitcoin’s rally starts to fade, according to crypto trader Michaël van de Poppe.

item.title: Bitcoin trading firm suggests a bullish trade with a key financing twist
item.description: The strategy aims to build upside exposure in March and April while minimizing upfront cost.

item.title: Bitcoin tops $72,000 as ETFs pull $155 million, extending two week inflow streak
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs added another $155 Million on Wednesday, continuing a two week run of institutional inflows even as Glassnode warns underlying demand remains fragile.

item.title: Senator Flags White House 'Corruption' Concerns Over Iran War Predictions Markets
item.description: The senator has slammed predictions markets betting on war in the Middle East, accusing White House officials of corruption.

item.title: Sky token jumps 10% after governance vote causes bullish tilt in market dynamics
item.description: The protocol has repurchased about 1.83 Billion SKY tokens with USDS while a March 2 governance proposal reduced staking emissions and expanded credit infrastructure around its USDS stablecoin.

item.title: A16z eyes 5th crypto fund as some peers look to new tech: Report
item.description: The crypto venture giant has launched a fifth fund with plans to close by mid-2026, according to sources.

item.title: Bitwise has now donated over $380K to open-source Bitcoin devs
item.description: Bitwise has tasked Bitcoin Brink, OpenSats and the Human Rights Foundation with deciding where to allocate its second annual donation to support Bitcoin.

item.title: Tether invests in AI sleep tracking firm at a $1.5B valuation
item.description: The stablecoin issuer led a $50 million funding round for Eight Sleep as the companies explore AI-driven health monitoring and sleep optimization.

item.title: Canadian Robbed of Crypto via ATM Kiosk, Recovery Efforts Lead to Another Scam Attempt
item.description: Police say scammers used RCMP branding to target a Nanaimo victim in a crypto recovery scheme after an earlier fraud.

item.title: Europol, FBI wipe major cybercrime forum LeakBase off the web
item.description: LeakBase followed RaidForums, a cybercrime marketplace seized by authorities in 2022 that once hosted leaked data from Ledger users.

item.title: Coinbase, Microsoft and Europol take down phishing service ‘Tycoon 2FA’
item.description: Tycoon 2FA accounted for 62% of phishing attempts Microsoft blocked by mid last year, including over 30 million emails in a single month.

item.title: Big Tech Joins White House Energy Pledge as Iran Tensions Threaten Higher Costs
item.description: Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Oracle, and xAI agreed to fund electricity supply and grid upgrades as AI energy demands spike.

item.title: Big Tech signs Trump pledge to cover their own AI energy costs
item.description: US President Donald Trump says AI data centers “need some PR help,” promising that tech giants will pay for their own power to run the energy-intensive projects.

item.title: Zerohash joins surging list of crypto firms vying for a bank charter
item.description: Several crypto companies have secured OCC conditional approval for a banking charter since the GENIUS Act was passed in July, including Circle, Ripple, Bridge and Stripe.

item.title: Star Trek’s Captain Kirk shows off X Money as limited beta goes live
item.description: Screenshots posted by William Shatner reveal cashback rewards, yield on deposits and FDIC-insured accounts for Musk’s new payment platform.

item.title: How Policy Shifts, Geopolitical Tensions Are Reshaping the Bitcoin Trade
item.description: Fresh ETF inflows, policy momentum and a deeper integration with the financial system are beginning to shift sentiment, analysts say.

item.title: Inside the Ray-Ban Smart Glasses Controversy Plaguing Meta
item.description: An investigation into Meta’s smart glasses has ignited concerns from regulators and privacy advocates over the use of sensitive footage.

item.title: Eric Trump, World Liberty co-founder, calls banks 'anti-American' over stablecoin fight
item.description: The World Liberty Financial co-founder and presidential son posted about the ongoing negotiations on stablecoin yield on Wednesday.

item.title: Crypto bulls slam Ray Dalio's 'tired narratives' in defense of bitcoin's future
item.description: Experts push back on billionaire hedge fund manager Ray Dalio's warning of bitcoin lacking gold’s qualities and risks from surveillance, quantum computing and lack of central bank buying.

item.title: Before You Quit ChatGPT, Do This to Take Your Data With You
item.description: The "QuitGPT" movement has passed 2.5 million pledges. But before you delete ChatGPT, here is every step to take so your data doesn't stay behind.

item.title: Bitwise Donates $233K of Bitcoin ETF Profits to Open-Source BTC Developers
item.description: Crypto asset management firm and ETF issuer Bitwise donated $233,000 to open-source Bitcoin developers in its latest annual contribution.

item.title: Bitcoin’s bullish momentum accelerates but topping $78K remains a challenge
item.description: Bitcoin’s rally is accelerating, but 43% of holders are still at a loss, leading traders to favor put options. Will this week’s gains hold?

item.title: Western Union teams with Crossmint to support USDPT stablecoin on Solana
item.description: The infrastructure provider will support the planned launch of Western Union’s USDPT stablecoin on Solana, linking blockchain payments to its global payout network.

item.title: 'The Worst Is Behind Us': Bitcoin Market Conditions Mirror FTX Bottom, Analysts Say
item.description: Several technical indicators for Bitcoin have reached levels not seen since the market chaos of 2022

item.title: Trump sends pro-Bitcoin Fed chair nomination to the Senate
item.description: The US president makes it official after previously announcing his pick of Kevin Warsh to replace Fed Chair Jerome Powell in a Jan. 30 social media post.

item.title: How this week's rout in Korean stocks might have triggered crypto's surge higher
item.description: Korea's tech-heavy Kospi has plunged 20% in the last two trading sessions, potentially pushing that country's fast-money chasing traders back into crypto.

item.title: Google's Gemini AI Pushed Florida Man to Suicide Amid 'Collapsing Reality', Lawsuit Alleges
item.description: The family of Jonathan Gavalas claims that Google's AI chatbot pushed a delusional narrative that escalated into violent missions and ended with his death.

item.title: Crypto's new run 'has legs' says analyst citing Trump's press on policy, institutional adoption
item.description: "We believe this run has legs," said analyst Owen Lau as bitcoin rose 8% over the past 24 hours to just above $73,000.

item.title: Dogecoin Pumps as Bitcoin Pops, Reversing Recent DOGE Losing Streak
item.description: Leading meme coin Dogecoin (DOGE) is outperforming Bitcoin, spiking 15% on the day as crypto prices rebound across the board.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin rises above $74,000 for the first time since February 4th. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE4yQVk5SlpPakVqLVluXzg3X0ZlNTFsWi1GeHoxS1RhMFNHYUt4UjFOam5TMEdMdkpVUDF1dGYyelhKSGxlT0hSV1Zxc2wycURvVHRiYmF3S2dIVjd2a3A4b0FvcFVtdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin rises abov…

item.title: Morgan Stanley Picks Coinbase, BNY as Custodians for Planned Bitcoin ETF
item.description: Morgan Stanley reveals its Bitcoin ETF custodians as the Wall Street giant moves closer to a full crypto embrace.

item.title: 🇨🇦 TODAY: $1.5T Scotia Bank has launched an active crypto picking ETF in Canada. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5zSGZaNmFiTzlWbGdKT1ZyZ01hY2Z2NmdhQy12dVhkQzFfRldRTVpTYU0xY3pveUNvWUZZRXF4eEQwWXhZc1ZtdEVoN3o5bENfU2lDUDNBQTFfRUoxOEQ3S2M3b3g?oc=5" target="_blank">🇨🇦 TODAY: $1.5T Scotia Bank h…

item.title: Investor demand for crypto funds is recovering: Crypto funds posted +$1.0 billion in inflows last week, the largest since the 3rd week of January. This broke a 5-week outflow streak that totaled -$4.0 billion. Bitcoin led the recovery with +$881 million in inflows, w - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5zN2NmSVlVT0xneVdrbGRvcFBaVGhvSzBvZjNLN2d1NmhpS0ZmanZsSXFZNzB1SkFGeVRtWVB3NnhueHVCODl5U0NjM192UXd0Y2syaVdMRWVibnd0QUdhWmlaQ1Q4dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Investor demand for crypto f…

item.title: South Korean Cop Sentenced to Six Years in Prison for Bribes Tied to Crypto Crime: Report
item.description: A former police officer in charge of investigating crypto crime in Seoul was sentenced to six years in prison for accepting bribes.

item.title: JUST IN: Spot Bitcoin ETF issuer Bitwise is donating $230,000 from its ETF profits to Bitcoin developers 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBvTXFBNHhFZ3NUelBUTGFqbFd0cXVscld3R3hLbExScnlzeFBRY1FHSnhYY1hzSS1qRzItN2lIblVqa3c5d182NE9QZlU3Qk5ZeU9GdUVwYVh3ZnVmZGpPVHh6b0wzVDg?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Spot Bitcoin ETF i…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation wants the network to be the trust layer for AI
item.description: Davide Crapis, the foundation's AI lead, sees the network acting as a coordination and verification layer in an increasingly AI-mediated world.

item.title: Banking Groups Slam Crypto Bank Kraken’s Fed Approval as Improper, Dangerous
item.description: Kraken became the first crypto bank to receive a Fed master account on Wednesday. The banking industry is not pleased.

item.title: CEO of crypto investment firm Keyrock says bitcoin is undervalued, entering ‘transition year’
item.description: Kevin de Patoul argues that 2026 won't be a washout for digital assets, but instead a structural reset as traditional finance quietly moves onchain.

item.title: Brian Armstrong met with Trump before the president slammed banks over crypto bill
item.description: CoinDesk was able to confirm the meeting between the US president and the Coinbase CEO took place as Politico initially reported.

item.title: Taiwan Indicts 62 Over Laundering $339M From Crypto Scam Compounds in Cambodia
item.description: Prosecutors have indicted 62 people over alleged links to Prince Group, designated as a transnational criminal organization by the U.S. DOJ.

item.title: Crypto campaign PAC Fairshake marks first wins in 2026 U.S. congressional primaries
item.description: In the opening primaries of the midterm congressional contests, Fairshake is celebrating victories of several pro-crypto candidates backed by the super PAC.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 White House officially nominates pro-Bitcoin Kevin Warsh to be the new Federal Reserve Chairman 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE92TTRJZGhUOHdfYnlveHdORU5TOXJvdjdlLUJlb1ZPbWlia1lzdU8yVG9nLTlQNW42NFRkNFktdnJ4eWR3ejhUekFXTUdITk9QTFdnMlZXOTVyem14SWNFTWpqQUZZcVE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 White House o…
